query:
SELECT cpa.*, p.name as projectName, u.email as userEmail
FROM clientProjectAssignments cpa
JOIN projects p ON cpa.projectId = p.id
JOIN users u ON cpa.userId = u.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Oncor%' OR p.name LIKE '%Switch%';
